name: Joey Calderazzo
abstract: Joseph Dominick Calderazzo (February 27, 1965) is an American jazz pianist and brother of musician Gene Calderazzo. He played extensively in bands led by Michael Brecker and Branford Marsalis, and has also led his own bands.

about_quotes.speaker: Branford Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: In my band, right? You have Eric Revis on bass. Justin Falkner on drums. Joey Calderazzo on piano.
about_quotes.doc_title: Branford Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Christian McBride
about_quotes.evidence: tonight marks the debut of Joey Calderazzo as a member of the band so I was listening to Joey
about_quotes.doc_title: Christian McBride interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 12, 1996

about_quotes.speaker: Bruce Johnstone
about_quotes.evidence: I was playing at a jazz festival in Boise, Idaho. Michael Brecker was the headliner. Michael was brilliant. He had Joey Calderazzo on piano...
about_quotes.doc_title: Bruce Johnstone interviewed by Monk Rowe, Dunkirk, New York, October 11, 2013
